name: deeprfp
description: AI RFP/tender connector for public procurement: analyze tenders, draft proposals, auto-fill questionnaires, build compliance matrices, and review bids.
long_description: MCP custom connector for DeepRFP. Exposes DeepRFP's AI agents as tools so Claude can analyze RFPs/tenders (bid/no-bid, requirements, deadlines, evaluation criteria), draft proposal responses grounded in your content library, auto-fill questionnaire/RFQ forms, generate compliance matrices, and run proposal reviews. DeepRFP does not publish an official public API, so the endpoint is configurable to target whatever your account exposes (default https://api.deeprfp.com/v1).

tools.name: deeprfp_list_projects
tools.description: List RFP/tender projects, optionally filtered by status.

tools.name: deeprfp_get_project
tools.description: Retrieve a project with its documents and generated artifacts.

tools.name: deeprfp_create_project
tools.description: Create a project for a specific opportunity.

tools.name: deeprfp_analyze_rfp
tools.description: Analyzer agent: requirements, dates, criteria, bid/no-bid recommendation.

tools.name: deeprfp_draft_response
tools.description: Writer agent: draft proposal sections grounded in your content library.

tools.name: deeprfp_answer_questionnaire
tools.description: Auto-fill questionnaire/RFQ questions from your library.

tools.name: deeprfp_search_library
tools.description: Search your content library for reusable material.

api_key.title: DeepRFP API Key
api_key.description: Bearer token for your DeepRFP account.

api_base_url.title: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: DeepRFP API base URL. Change only if your account uses a custom endpoint.
